title: pilosella lagopus
intro: Pilosella lagopus, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family with a distinctive red flower. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pilosella lagopus can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is also used in herbal capsules and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
